channel.title: Energy on After the Grind
channel.description: Recent content in Energy on After the Grind

item.title: The Graph That Goes Down and to the Right
item.description: Germany shut down its last nuclear plant in 2025. The graph of their nuclear output is a straight line from 170 terawatt-hours down to zero. Every time you see a graph that goes down and to the right, it is failure. This one is no different.
